generated_comment:
A: Yeah, she speaks well, no doubt. 
B: But honestly, in these companies a lot of women managers get fast-tracked for diversity optics also. Merit alag cheez hai, presentation alag.
label: misogynistic
annotation_note: This is misogynistic because it undermines a woman leader's competence by attributing her advancement to diversity hiring rather than merit. It encodes the 'merit undermining' and 'quota/diversity hire' surface manifestation in a casual corporate register.
persona_text: You are Mohit. Age 27. A junior employee at a tech startup in Bengaluru. You are in the office cafeteria having lunch with three male colleagues after your female engineering manager just led a very strong all hands presentation. One colleague says she was impressive. You are responding and giving your actual opinion of her.
